nodes.label: SettingsRepositoryTest.kt
SettingsRepositoryTest
.setup()
.tearDown()
.`setDefaultsIfNecessary should set LOCK default values for the given user if necessary`()
.`setDefaultsIfNecessary should set LOCK default values for the given user with a password if necessary`()
.`setDefaultsIfNecessary should set LOGOUT default values for the given user without a password if necessary`()
.`setDefaultsIfNecessary should reset default values to LOGOUT for the given user without a password if necessary`()

.`isUnlockWithBiometricsEnabled should return a value that tracks the existence of a biometrics key for the current user`()

.`isAccessibilityEnabledStateFlow should emit whenever the accessibilityEnabledManager does`()
.`isAutofillEnabledStateFlow should emit whenever the AutofillEnabledManager does`()

.`getUserFingerprint should return failure with no active user`()
.`getUserFingerprint should return failure with active user when source returns failure`()

.`setupBiometricsKey with getUserEncryptionKey success should return BiometricsKeyResult Success`()
.`storeUnlockPin when the master password on restart is required should only save an encrypted PIN to disk`()
.`storeUnlockPin when the master password on restart is not required should save all PIN data to disk`()
.`clearUnlockPin should clear any previously stored PIN-related values for the current user`()
.`isScreenCaptureAllowed property should update SettingsDiskSource and emit changes`()

.`getUserHasLoggedInValue should default to false if no value exists`()
.`getUserHasLoggedInValue should return true if it exists`()
.`storeUserHasLoggedInValue should store value of true to disk`()
.`isAuthenticatorSyncEnabled set to true should generate an authenticator sync key and also a symmetric key if none exists`()
.`isAuthenticatorSyncEnabled set to true should generate an authenticator sync key and leave symmetric key untouched if already set`()
.`isAuthenticatorSyncEnabled set to false should clear authenticator sync key and leave symmetric sync key untouched`()
.`isAuthenticatorSyncEnabled should be true when there exists an authenticator sync key`()
.`isAuthenticatorSyncEnabled should be false when there is no active user`()
.`isAuthenticatorSyncEnabled should be false when the active user has no authenticator sync key set`()

.`isUnlockWithPinEnabledFlow should react to changes in AuthDiskSource`()

.`isAppRegisteredForExport should return true if it exists`()
.`storeAppRegisteredForExport should store value of true to disk`()
.`getAppRegisteredForExportFlow should react to changes in SettingsDiskSource`()
.`mutableActivePolicyFlow without vault timeout policy should do nothing`()

.`mutableActivePolicyFlow emissions should update the vault timeout accordingly`()
